name: Grand Slam Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Chill until slightly thickened.
3. Mix graham cracker crumbs and margarine. Line the bottom and sides of a 9x13 inch baking dish. Reserve some crumbs.
4. Cream together cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla extract.
5. Add gelatin, lemon juice, and yellow food coloring to the cream cheese mixture. Beat until well blended.
6. Fold in stiffly whipped whipping cream.
7. Pour into the prepared crust and sprinkle with remaining crumbs.
8. Chill thoroughly.
9. Cut into squares and serve. May be garnished with fruit.
10. Serves 16-20. You may freeze half of this recipe and enjoy it later.
11. VARIATION: Instead of stiffly whipping the cream first, chill the cream and whip it with gelatin and cheese mixtures. Mix well on medium speed of mixer.
